records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+' AND a.element = 'br'

records.question: Which molecules have a label of - and contain atoms with the element sn?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'sn' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '-' AND a.element = 'sn'

records.question: Which molecules have at least one atom with the element exactly equal to 'f' and also have at least one bond?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM atom a WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND a.element = 'f'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM bond b WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
)

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain atoms with element na and have bonds where bond_type is -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'na' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '+'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM atom a
  WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  AND a.element = 'na'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM bond b
  WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  AND b.bond_type = '-'
)
